title: Super Smash brothers - All mario fight.
description:
Apperently, if you put a movie on Windows movie maker, the make it a WMM movie, it will take less space then if it was divx/xvid encoded.

I'm in process of collecting rejected material from "Summer movie". But I'm tired as all get out, and I can't get a hold of Pound. So it's going to be a while.

It's not like you guys knew about this anyway.
;P
